Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter Lip Balm Pure Petroleum Jelly Stick .16oz

Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter Lip Balm Moisturizing Lip Stick is clinically proven to help heal dry lips! Formulated with Vaseline’s 100% pure triple-purified petroleum jelly and rich cocoa butter, this lip balm moisturizing stick works to lock in moisture and provide proven relief for dull, dry, cracked, sunburnt, windburned or damaged lips.

FORMULA: Alongside petroleum jelly, cocoa butter is a key ingredient in this lip conditioning formula. Rich in antioxidants, vitamins and fatty acids, coco butter deeply penetrates the layers of skin to moisturize, improve elasticity and protect lips by creating a barrier to lock in moisture.

Key Features

  • SOFT MOISTURIZED LIPS: For healthy, deeply moisturized and conditioned lips, Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter Lip Balm Moisturizer Stick with Pure Petroleum Jelly instantly softens and soothes dry lips; suitable for daily use and a great addition to any survival kit, first aid bag, makeup bag or with travel accessories
  • UNIQUE FORMULA: Formulated with 100 percent pure triple-purified petroleum jelly and rich cocoa butter, this Vaseline lip therapy lip balm works to lock in moisture and provide proven relief for dull, dry, cracked, sunburnt, windburned or damaged lips
  • BEAUTY ESSENTIAL: Whether using it as a lip mask or lipstick base, the cocoa butter lip stick lip balm is truly a multipurpose moisturizing tool that you’ll want to include in your regular beauty and makeup routine
  • BENEFITS OF COCOA BUTTER: A key ingredient in this moisturizing lip balm formula, cocoa butter is rich in antioxidants, vitamins and fatty acids that deeply penetrate the layers of skin to moisturize and protect lips; it works alongside Vaseline’s pure, triple purified petroleum jelly to create a barrier over the lips and lock in moisture
  • NON-GREASY FORMULA: The Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter Lip Balm Moisturizer goes on soft and lightweight while providing the utmost moisturization for your lips; no greasy residue left behind on your lips

Product Specifications

  • MPN: VLTCS48268
  • UPC: 852809231167
  • Color: Brown
  • Size: Regular

BEAUTY ESSENTIAL: Whether using the lip balm as a lip mask or lipstick base, Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter Lip Balm Moisturizer with Pure Petroleum Jelly is truly a multipurpose moisturizing tool that you’ll want to include in your beauty and makeup routine again and again. The Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter Lip Balm Moisturizer goes on soft and lightweight, while still providing the utmost moisturization for your lips; and, there is never any greasy residue left behind! TRAVEL FRIENDLY: This pocket-sized Vaseline lip therapy lip balm is a great addition to your makeup bag and travel accessories. Small enough to tote with you wherever you go, take it on your next vacation, road trip, road trip or ski or snowboarding adventure! It’s suitable for daily use and a great addition to any survival kit or first aid tote
